---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list=ls())

# 加载包
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(jtools)
library(foreign)
library(survival)
library(MASS)
library(nnet)
library(epiDisplay)
library(purrr)

# 导入数据
df <- read.csv("positive_patients.csv",
               stringsAsFactors = FALSE)  # 避免自动转因子

# 指定哪些列不要转因子
keep_as_is <- c("age", "treat_days", "event_status", "patient_id", "菌株号")

# 转换
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    across(-all_of(keep_as_is), as.factor),  # 除了这些列，全部转因子
    age = as.numeric(age),
    treat_days = as.numeric(treat_days),
    event_status = as.numeric(event_status),
    patient_id = as.character(patient_id),
    菌株号 = as.character(菌株号),
    symptom_status = factor(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.,
                            levels = c(1, 0),
                            labels = c("Symptomatic", "Asymptomatic"))
  )
# 查看数据结构
str(df)
```


```{r 22}
##单因素逻辑回归
#性别
df$gender.male.1..female.0. <- relevel(factor(df$gender.male.1..female.0.), ref = "0")
# 执行单因素逻辑回归
logit_gender <- glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1. ~ gender.male.1..female.0., data = df, family = binomial())
# 查看回归结果
logistic.display(logit_gender)
```

```{r 23}
#年龄
logit_years<-glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1. ~ age,family = binomial, data = df)
logistic.display(logit_years)
df$age_cat <- relevel(factor(df$age_cat), ref = "3")
model1 <- glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1. ~ age_cat,family = binomial, data = df)
logistic.display(model1)
```

```{r 24}
#民族
df$minority.no.0..yes.1. <- relevel(factor(df$minority.no.0..yes.1.), ref = "0")
logit_minzu<-glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1. ~ minority.no.0..yes.1.,family = binomial, data = df)
logistic.display(logit_minzu)

```

```{r 25}
#huji
logit_huji<-glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.~ migrant.no.0.yes.1..,family = binomial, data = df)
logistic.display(logit_huji)

```

```{r 26}
#zhiye
df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1. <- relevel(factor(df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.), ref = "1")
df$occupation <- relevel(factor(df$occupation), ref = "4")
logit_zhiye<-glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.~occupation,family = binomial, data = df)
logistic.display(logit_zhiye)

```

```{r 29}
#0result
logit_0result<-glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.~ smear0.negative.2..positive.1.,family = binomial, data = df)
df$smear0.negative.2..positive.1. <- relevel(factor(df$smear0.negative.2..positive.1.), ref = "1")
logistic.display(logit_0result)

```

```{r cul}
#0culture
df$culture0 <- relevel(factor(df$culture0), ref = "1")
logit_0cul<-glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.~culture0,family = binomial, data = df)
logistic.display(logit_0cul)

df$fenzi0 <- relevel(factor(df$fenzi0), ref = "1")
logit_fen <- glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.~ fenzi0,family = binomial, data = df)
logistic.display(logit_fen)
```

```{r 30}
#jieju
df$outcomes <- relevel(factor(df$outcomes), ref = "3")
logit_jieju<-glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.~outcomes,family = binomial, data = df)
logistic.display(logit_jieju)

```

```{r diabetes}
table(df$diabetes,df$sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.)
df$diabetes <- relevel(factor(df$diabetes), ref = "1")
df_new <- df_5[df_5$diabetes != 0, ]
#df_new$tang1 <- relevel(factor(df_new$tang1), ref = "2")

logit_dia <- glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1. ~ diabetes, family = binomial, data = df_new)
logistic.display(logit_dia)

```

```{r lin}
df_4$lineage <- relevel(factor(df_4$lineage), ref = "1")
logit_lin<-glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.~lineage,family = binomial, data = df_4)
logistic.display(logit_lin)

```

```{r drlogi}
df_5$Drug.resistance.profile.sus.0.dr.1.mdr.2. <- relevel(factor(df_5$Drug.resistance.profile.sus.0.dr.1.mdr.2.), ref = "0")
logit_dr<-glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1.~Drug.resistance.profile.sus.0.dr.1.mdr.2.,family = binomial, data = df_5)
logistic.display(logit_dr)

```

```{r 32}
# 执行多因素逻辑回归
df_5$diabetes <- relevel(factor(df_5$diabetes), ref = "1")
df_5$occupation <- relevel(factor(df_5$occupation), ref="4")
#df_new
model_1 <- glm(sym.aTB.0..sTB.1. ~  gender.male.1..female.0.+ age +  occupation + fenzi0 + diabetes +Drug.resistance.profile.sus.0.dr.1.mdr.2., family = binomial, data = df_5)
# 查看回归结果
logistic.display(model_1)

```

```{r step}
df2 <- subset(df, select = -c(shortid, patient_id,status))
# 删除 df2 中任何包含 NA 的行
df2_clean <- na.omit(df2)
df2_clean
df2_clean$age_cat <- relevel(factor(df2_clean$age_cat), ref = "3")
model_step1<-glm(scTB2~., data=df2_clean,family = binomial)
model_step2<-step(model_step1,direction = "both")
summary(model_step2)
logistic.display(model_step2)
```
